verdicts.title: PostgresRuntimeApiStore missing 3 PersistencePort approval methods
verdicts.note: grep of postgres/ shows zero occurrences of list_assigned_approvals/list_pending_expired_approvals/list_pending_approvals_for_membership_audit (all present in_memory:911/949/973 + file:1509/1539/1554); live path routes.py:354 -> approval_coordinator.py:140 calls persistence.list_assigned_approvals -> AttributeError on postgres; ApprovalExpirySweeper (approval_expiry_sweeper.py:232) never imported outside its own file.

verdicts.title: Citation store wiring split-brain on non-postgres backends
verdicts.note: RuntimePorts dataclass (factory.py:110-133) has no citation_store field; loop.py:76-80 isinstance(persistence, CitationStorePort) else throwaway InMemoryCitationStore; File/InMemory RuntimeApiStore lack insert_many_or_get (only postgres:5692 defines it) so isinstance fails and worker writes to a private store while API reads ports.source_store / a separate InMemoryCitationStore (app.py:650).

verdicts.title: File adapter re-implements in-memory business logic verbatim
verdicts.note: charge_budget is logic-identical between in_memory:1835-1868 and file:2473-2509 except async-with self._state_lock + _rewrite_budget_states(); the three runtime_api_store.py total 11087 LOC (in_memory 2283 + file 2924 + postgres 5880) while base.py shares only 404.

verdicts.title: PersistencePort is a ~90-method god interface (structural Protocol)
verdicts.note: PersistencePort (ports.py:85-928) declares 79 async methods (finding's '~90' is an approximation, still unambiguously a god interface); it is a @runtime_checkable Protocol so incomplete impls boot cleanly (the exact mechanism behind F1); persistence/ports.py:89-351 shows the correct 7-role granularity.

verdicts.title: Retention/deletion semantics diverge per backend with no capability signal
verdicts.note: postgres sweep_retention_kind branches on 8 RetentionKinds (postgres:3649-4119); file only acts on MESSAGES + returns empty tallies with backfill_retention_until/recompute_retention_until_for_policy as 'return 0' stubs (file:2678,2716,2720); in_memory is an explicit no-op (in_memory:1027-1052); delete_user_history erases bytes on file (file:1696-1738) vs tombstones on postgres/in-memory per its own docstring.

verdicts.title: File-store product surfaces (export/import, search, health, verify) mounted nowhere
verdicts.note: export_conversation/import_conversation/search_conversations/store_health/conversation_health/needs_repair_ids/verify_audit_log have no runtime_api route and no src consumer (only docstrings + an internal _index/_health call); only unit tests (test_conversation_search/test_export_import/test_audit_manifest) exercise them; export_import.py is 569 LOC.

verdicts.title: Todo-extraction/share-snapshot adapters + PERSISTENCE_TABLE_RECORDS + schema shim unwired
verdicts.note: no src constructs InMemory/PostgresTodoExtractionStore and todo_extractor.py:145 extraction_store:object job is never wired into worker main/loop; InMemoryShareSnapshotStore has zero src refs (app.py:196-197 registers share_service as share_snapshot_port); PERSISTENCE_TABLE_RECORDS (records/__init__.py:94) has zero real consumers; schema/postgres.py (91 LOC) consumed only by test_postgres_schema.py.

verdicts.title: Layering inversion: canonical record models live in runtime_api/schemas
verdicts.note: ConversationRecord/MessageRecord/RunRecord are defined in runtime_api/schemas/{runs,conversations}.py; 'pure domain' persistence imports upward (message_copy.py:27 from runtime_api.schemas import MessageRecord; base.py:8-14; file/runtime_api_store.py:120); 27 files under agent_runtime/ import runtime_api, contradicting the documented domain/presentation split in CLAUDE.md.

verdicts.title: Default tool budget seed hand-maintained in three places
verdicts.note: Low severity accepted as written per verification policy.

verdicts.title: Test-only helpers and file-store extras sit unevenly on the shared surface
verdicts.note: Low severity accepted as written per verification policy.

verdicts.title: Desktop file-store data is plaintext-at-rest by design
verdicts.note: Low severity accepted as written per verification policy.
